Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “The Networking” tool. We meet lots of great people at events and masterminds. But
some connections are a must. Let this tool be the easy way to share your interest in a mutually beneficial relationship that can help you and others scale
your business and life exponentially!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down your name and your company.
Write down what it is your company does and who it helps.
Write down what you think you and the other person could do to partner and team up to both grow.
Write down the best result if you guys had a successful partnership.
Write down the best way to connect and maybe even your assistants information.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
